calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Andrea Leung.

Ms. Alavi stated that Andrea Leung prepared an inventory with the household items on July 6, 2009, that the first portion identifies all of the items, that the only things of value were the two cars and that the cars were given to Ms. Light pursuant to the settlement agreement. In addition, Ms. Alavi stated that Ms. Leung looked for the items listed on the list provided by Ms. Davenport, that some of the items were not found, that there were some questions as to who they belonged to and that nothing other than the two cars had any value. Furthermore, Ms. Alavi explained the extent of services provided to support the fee requests. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Continued To Jul-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Continued To Jul-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Harrington for Babbette Light. Avid Alavi for Andrea Leung (Petitioner). Deborah Fox for Louise Davenport.

The Court stated that the issue with the settlement agreement was whether Mr. Fowlis had the agreement in front of him at the time he signed the consent form. Ms. Fox stated that Mr. Fowlis represented his Sister and that the Sister spoke with him at length before the mediation and that she told him to do what ever he thought was right. In addition, Ms. Fox stated that Mr. Fowlis was not happy with Amy's client receiving the automobiles, that she believed he saw the agreement, that there was a power of attorney signed on his behalf, that she spoke to him and that he said yes, and that he has capacity. The Petition for Order Approving Settlement was granted (order for the same signed in open court). The Petition for Letters of Adminstration filed by Andrea Leung was granted (order for the same signed in open court). A bond in the amount of $282,000.00 is required. The Petition for Probate of Will filed by Babbette Light was taken off calendar. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Louise Davenport was also taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Continued To Nov-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Casimir Wilson for Babbette Light. Deborah Fox for Louise Davenport.

Counsel informed the Court that they wanted to participate in mediation. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation, (signing the order for the same in open court). Mediation must be completed no later than October 27, 2009. The matter was continued to November 3, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Tamra Keen, CSR#5404. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
